title: Chatsarmaveth #2700
definition:
Hazarmaveth = "village of death"

 n pr m
 1) the 3rd in order of the sons of Joktan
 ++++
 He was the founder of an ancient people of southern Arabia which
 later became  a province and important commercial centre
nasbUsage:

 n pr m
